display.purpose: Hero headline only; uppercase and capped at 6rem.

displayCompact.purpose: Hero headline from 1024px through 1279px beside the compact evidence rail.

headline.purpose: Section headings with decisive scale contrast.

subhead.purpose: Article subsections and compact feature headings.

title.purpose: Project rows and compact item titles.

prose.purpose: Long-form article copy with a relaxed line height.

label.purpose: Mono uppercase navigation, actions, tags, and status.

embedName.purpose: Tweet author and quote title text only.

motion.name: dot-field
motion.purpose: The hero's sole ambient motion; static under reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Safety Orange block CTA with a black stamped label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; min-height:48px; min-width:220px; background:var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); color:var(--text-on-accent,#000); font-family:'Geist Mono Variable',monospace; font-size:.75rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; padding:0 24px; border:0; border-radius:0; transition:background 240ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:var(--ind-accent-hover,#ff7a2e); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Hairline secondary action; hover shifts border and text to Safety Orange.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; min-height:48px; min-width:190px; background:transparent; color:var(--text-primary,#e8e4df); font-family:'Geist Mono Variable',monospace; font-size:.75rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; padding:0 24px; border:1px solid var(--border-strong,rgba(255,255,255,.2)); border-radius:0; transition:color 240ms ease,border-color 240ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color:var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); border-color:var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Hairline metadata tag using the Stamped Label voice.
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-block; font-family:'Geist Mono Variable',monospace; font-size:.75rem; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text-secondary,#a8a29e); border:1px solid var(--border-medium,rgba(255,255,255,.12)); padding:4px 10px; border-radius:0; background:transparent; }

components.name: Project Ledger Row
components.description: A full-width evidence row with project, problem statement, proof, and outbound action.
components.html: astro-takumiOG image generation for Astro. This site runs on it.★ 32 · Powers this site↗
components.css: .ds-project-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:.7fr 1.3fr 180px 32px; align-items:center; gap:24px; padding:28px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-strong,rgba(255,255,255,.2)); background:transparent; color:var(--text-primary,#e8e4df); text-decoration:none; transition:background 240ms ease; } .ds-project-row:hover { background:var(--surface,#1e1e1e); } .ds-project-row:hover strong { color:var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); } .ds-project-row span,.ds-project-row small { color:var(--text-muted,#9c9590); } .ds-project-row small { font-family:'Geist Mono Variable',monospace; text-transform:uppercase; } .ds-project-row b { color:var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); } .ds-project-row:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); outline-offset:-2px; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Four compact destinations plus a persistent GitHub action.
components.html: WorkAboutNotesGitHub ↗
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; align-items:stretch; min-height:64px; border:1px solid var(--border-medium,rgba(255,255,255,.12)); } .ds-nav-link,.ds-nav-github { display:flex; align-items:center; padding:0 18px; font-family:'Geist Mono Variable',monospace; font-size:.75rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; text-decoration:none; color:var(--text-secondary,#a8a29e); } .ds-nav-link:hover,.ds-nav-link-active { color:var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); } .ds-nav-github { margin-left:auto; background:var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); color:#000; } .ds-nav-github:hover { background:var(--ind-accent-hover,#ff7a2e); } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--ind-accent,#f25c05); outline-offset:-2px; }

components.name: Status
components.description: The only circular shape in the system, reserved for current work status.
components.css: .ds-status { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; color:var(--color-success-raw,#52b788); font-family:'Geist Mono Variable',monospace; font-size:.75rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:.12em; text-transform:uppercase; } .ds-status span { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:currentColor; }

narrative.overview: A dark shop floor where work is logged and proof is easy to inspect. Near-black surfaces, shared hairlines, square geometry, stamped labels, and one Safety Orange accent create an understated technical identity. The site rejects both corporate-resume stiffness and effect-heavy portfolio theater; the work stays legible and first.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, flat surfaces separated by shared 1px hairlines
One Safety Orange accent with a single committed-color profile panel
Geist proportional type with Geist Mono functional labels
Varied evidence layouts instead of repeated card grids
A shared 320px to 360px evidence rail aligns navigation, hero, work, writing, and footer
The hero dot field is the sole ambient motion

rules.name: The Safety Orange Rule
rules.body: Most screens keep orange below 10%; the working-profile panel is the sole large identity surface.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Separation is drawn, not floated; adjacent cells share borders.

rules.name: The Stamped Label Rule
rules.body: Mono uppercase labels are functional and consistent, never decorative filler.

rules.name: The Flat Floor Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from tone and hairlines. Decorative shadows are not part of the system.

dos: Do keep corners square; only status dots are circular.
Do use shared hairlines and tonal steps for separation.
Do reserve Safety Orange for interaction, state, and the working-profile identity panel.
Do provide a reduced-motion alternative for the hero dot field.
Do back claims with current stars, forks, and direct repository links.
donts: Don't drift into a corporate resume timeline or a LinkedIn-shaped profile.
Don't add scroll-jacking, parallax, or effects that bury content.
Don't add decorative shadows, rounded cards, or glassmorphism.
Don't add a second accent hue or gradient text.
Don't repeat identical cards or decorative kickers as section scaffolding.
Don't set gray text below #9c9590 on Shop Floor.
